negative_placeholder_returned: Returned a sentinel negative value (e.g., -1) instead of the actual observation result.
unnecessary_service_request_created: Created a ServiceRequest order when the task only required retrieving a lab value.
patient_lookup_not_performed: Did not issue a FHIR query to retrieve the patient before attempting to answer.
patient_not_found_incorrect: Incorrectly reported 'Patient not found' despite the patient existing.
observation_lookup_not_performed: Did not perform the required Observation GET request before answering.
observation_post_not_executed: Failed to POST a new Observation for recording a measured vital sign.
age_extracted_from_missing_field: Returned an age value assuming a non‑existent age field in the Patient resource.
unnecessary_medication_order_placed: Placed a MedicationRequest despite the lab value not meeting the low threshold, i.e., ordering when not indicated.
threshold_comparison_inverted: Incorrectly interpreted lab value direction, treating a low result as normal/high and vice versa.
observation_code_incomplete: Posted Observation lacks proper coding (e.g., missing LOINC CodeableConcept), using only free‑text code.
required_order_not_placed: The agent failed to create the required order (e.g., MedicationRequest/ServiceRequest) when the clinical condition indicated it was necessary.
